---
title: FireR Package
date: '2026-03-21'
description: An R Package for U.S. Fire Data
categories:
- R
featured: true
icon: flame
---

[View Package](https://noahweidig.com/fireR/){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"}

An R package for accessing and analyzing U.S. fire incident data. Simplifies downloading, processing, and visualization of wildfire and prescribed burn records.
